author: Pseudo-Alcuin
title: De divinis officiis
date: (before the Ordo romanus antiquus = Ordo L, thus, before 950)
editions: In regards to Pseudo-Alcuin and his significance for the history of worship, see M. Andrieu, „L’Ordo romanus antiquus et le Liber de divinis officiis du Pseudo-Alcuin,” Revue des Sciences Religieuses 5 (1925) 642-650. 'farrago ex diversis ipsius Alcuini aliorumque auctorum ipso posteriorum scriptis collecta'
